rationale: Educ. Code §21.354 governs appraisal of school administrators and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt a recommended appraisal process and criteria on which to appraise the performance of various classifications of school administrators.
_note: Rule text concerns school administrator performance appraisal; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
